channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: With just months until the midterms, President Trump relieve…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: With just months until the midterms, President Trump relieved the remaining members of the U.S. Election Assistance Commission, a move condemned by Democrats and voting rights advocates. n.pr/4fqYVOG
item.content:encoded: With just months until the midterms, President Trump relieved the remaining members of the U.S. Election Assistance Commission, a move condemned by Democrats and voting rights advocates. n.pr/4fqYVOG

item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
ボーイズグループの精鋭がカッコよく任務遂行
カッコ悪かったら即永久追放
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680172?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

・浦川翔平（THE RAMPAGE）
・マサヒロ（超特急）
・八村倫太郎（WATWING）
・深堀未来（BALLISTIK BOYZ）
・中川勝就（OWV）
・大久保波留（DXTEEN）
が世界征服阻止に挑む

#カッコインポッシブル

item.title: New Music Friday | July 10 Record Club is back with another…
item.author: Record Club (@record.club)
item.description:
New Music Friday | July 10

Record Club is back with another round of new music! Let us know below which release you decide to check out first tonight. And for a more comprehensive list of releases or to see what the community is saying, head to record.club and join the conversation now.
item.content:encoded:
New Music Friday | July 10

Record Club is back with another round of new music! Let us know below which release you decide to check out first tonight. And for a more comprehensive list of releases or to see what the community is saying, head to record.club and join the conversation now.

item.title: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French,…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French, one of the pre-tournament favorites, move on to the World Cup semifinals against either Spain or Belgium. n.pr/3STj3jI
item.content:encoded: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French, one of the pre-tournament favorites, move on to the World Cup semifinals against either Spain or Belgium. n.pr/3STj3jI

item.title: The disability community has long worried about what would h…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The disability community has long worried about what would happen if special education oversight moved from the Education Department to another agency. Now, those moves are becoming more real. n.pr/3SVjgTt
item.content:encoded: The disability community has long worried about what would happen if special education oversight moved from the Education Department to another agency. Now, those moves are becoming more real. n.pr/3SVjgTt

item.title: Rock icons Bon Scott (AC/DC) and Mitch Mitchell (the Jimi He…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Rock icons Bon Scott (AC/DC) and Mitch Mitchell (the Jimi Hendrix Experience) were born 80 years ago today

[📷: Michael Ochs Archives]
item.content:encoded:
Rock icons Bon Scott (AC/DC) and Mitch Mitchell (the Jimi Hendrix Experience) were born 80 years ago today

[📷: Michael Ochs Archives]

item.title: ICYMI King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard announced their 28th …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
ICYMI King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard announced their 28th album, ‘Alien Metal.’

The Aussie rock sextet recorded the electronic music on ‘Alien Metal’ with a Eurorack setup they toured with last year. “It completely rewired my brain,” says Stu Mackenzie.

stereogum.com/2504529/king...
item.content:encoded:
ICYMI King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard announced their 28th album, ‘Alien Metal.’

The Aussie rock sextet recorded the electronic music on ‘Alien Metal’ with a Eurorack setup they toured with last year. “It completely rewired my brain,” says Stu Mackenzie.

stereogum.com/2504529/king...

item.title: New & Notable: The idiosyncratic Toronto indie rock project …

item.description: New & Notable: The idiosyncratic Toronto indie rock project branches out into sampling and looping on their latest.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: The idiosyncratic Toronto indie rock project branches out into sampling and looping on their latest.

item.title: 中村達也率いるLOSALIOS、21年ぶりのアルバムは「太陽系の鳥たち」 https://natalie.mu/mus…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
中村達也率いるLOSALIOS、21年ぶりのアルバムは「太陽系の鳥たち」
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680130?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#LOSALIOS

item.title: The Interior Department is arguing D.C. height limits don't …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Interior Department is arguing D.C. height limits don't apply to federal projects, bucking a century of precedent. If the panel reviewing Trump's arch agrees, experts say it could change the city. n.pr/4y8Hw4B
item.content:encoded: The Interior Department is arguing D.C. height limits don't apply to federal projects, bucking a century of precedent. If the panel reviewing Trump's arch agrees, experts say it could change the city. n.pr/4y8Hw4B

item.title: New & Notable: An album of deep roots reggae that draws from…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: An album of deep roots reggae that draws from an eclectic range of influences.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: An album of deep roots reggae that draws from an eclectic range of influences.

item.title: Kaye's collaboration with Smith began in 1971 and continues …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Kaye's collaboration with Smith began in 1971 and continues to this day. He says she taught him to trust his musical sensibilities — and to always keep evolving. Now 79, he has his first solo album. n.pr/4vwQrKU
item.content:encoded: Kaye's collaboration with Smith began in 1971 and continues to this day. He says she taught him to trust his musical sensibilities — and to always keep evolving. Now 79, he has his first solo album. n.pr/4vwQrKU

item.title: America’s Toughest Workout Isn’t in a Gym — It’s on the Stre…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
America’s Toughest Workout Isn’t in a Gym — It’s on the Street

In cities across the country, underground calisthenics battles are pushing elite athletes to their limits.

Story: bit.ly/44lbapS
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Families can still benefit even if their children aren't eli…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Families can still benefit even if their children aren't eligible for the free $1,000 contribution from the federal government.
item.content:encoded: Families can still benefit even if their children aren't eligible for the free $1,000 contribution from the federal government.

item.title: Curious where jazz can go beyond familiar scales? Check out …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Curious where jazz can go beyond familiar scales? Check out these essential albums from the vibrant world of microtonal jazz, where alternative tunings open entirely new sonic possibilities.
item.content:encoded: Curious where jazz can go beyond familiar scales? Check out these essential albums from the vibrant world of microtonal jazz, where alternative tunings open entirely new sonic possibilities.

item.title: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French,…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French, one of the pre-tournament favorites, move on to the World Cup semifinals against either Spain or Belgium.
item.content:encoded: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French, one of the pre-tournament favorites, move on to the World Cup semifinals against either Spain or Belgium.

item.title: Mountain bike enthusiasts have been working for years on an …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Mountain bike enthusiasts have been working for years on an ambitious 485-mile, multi-use trail called The Velomont that will span the length of the state. They're making sure it's friendly for people with disabilities, particularly cyclists.
item.content:encoded: Mountain bike enthusiasts have been working for years on an ambitious 485-mile, multi-use trail called The Velomont that will span the length of the state. They're making sure it's friendly for people with disabilities, particularly cyclists.
